properties.title: Power slope
properties.description: Between the big barn and the hills you find a secret spot perfectly surrounded by a big slope of sand. Might be a perfect spot for late night sessions.

properties.title: Barn Upper floor
properties.description: Top floor of barn. Wooden walls don't block sound much. Elevated position.
properties.upgrade-actions: Sound proofing on walls, especially N and NE

properties.title: Sheep barn
properties.description:
Sheep barn (lower concrete barn building) 🐑 
Classification: B
Proposed upgrade actions:
Sound-proofing the windows and walls
Keeping doors and windows closed

properties.title: litte mu
properties.description: North part of Field in the west. Access  through a forest road. Muumima's blue house placed here. Play directly towards forest. No sound blocking to the north unfortunately

properties.title: sniff
properties.description: Sniff is a bit further south, making better use of the forest blocking than sibling "little mu". Also directed more south.

properties.title: cosmonova
properties.sound-direction-comment: into forest hill. not east (lake and flat grounds)
properties.description: Field in the west. Between the bridge and Little Mu you find a spot with panorama view. If speakers are pointed towards the forest, the sound is captivated by the terrain in the forest.
properties.upgrade-actions: directional subs or sound block north

properties.title: queendom
properties.description: Fairly close to the lake. Access from the north, but also through a forest road going from the hills. A small bridge is built to cross the ditch when going from forest to open field. Another bridge may be needed for better access

properties.title: kingdom
properties.description: On the far lower west side, the slope inside the forest to the west will absorb sound. Grass is moist but not wet usually.
Access from the from parking. Road building may make this spot end up on the new road. Limited sound block to E and NE.
properties.title: sex on the field
properties.upgrade-actions: dir subs and sound block NE

properties.title: far away
properties.description: On the far lower west side, the slope inside the forest to the west will absorb sound. Grass is moist but not wet usually.

properties.title: the cleavage
properties.description: Valley between the sunny hills. Facing the forest. Excellent sound proofing - tested in 2024 & 2025. Best in class spot!
Natural reserve. In forest, direction into the hill. Close to the lake. A bit down hill from the Glade 2024 spot. Natural reserve - need special permissions probably.
properties.title: deep forest shore
the moss
properties.description: Natural reserve. Hidden in the forest there is a cosy spot with lots of moss and trees, well suited for sound. Approach from the path leading form the big barn to the west field.
Down by the end of the hills in the corner, the sound is protected by the hill if speakers are put in the lowest part. Might interfere with the "power slope" spot if playing at the same time.
properties.title: back2back
creaky
properties.description: Lower part of the hills, by the creek. Playing into the hill. Bridge over creek close to this spot.

properties.title: foxmantle
properties.description: Grassy patch between the trees. Surrounded by trees and uphill in all directions but SW. Close to the creek. Slightly down-hill from FoxHole2024 location.

properties.title: brewery
properties.upgrade-actions: Sound block needed: Insulate the walls, mainly to the north and east.
properties.description: Wooden building with a basement (concrete). Renovated in 2023 & 2024. Poor sound proofing of the walls. Elevated postition means more sound spread
OUTSIDE alversjö. Forest location, on a crossing. Not on Borderland-land. need special permission probably. Playing NE straight into a hill, with trees in all four directions.
properties.title: forest gump
scott eastwood
properties.description: Lowlands next to the forest. Playing straight into a hill. Grass gets wet further from the trees. May be swampy if it rains a lot (2024 was OK).
By the woods to the east. Playing into the steep hill in the forest. Good sunset spot. Ground was dry in 2024.
properties.title: clint eastwood
rascal swamp
properties.description: Lowlands to the east, next to a hill. Wet below the hill in 2024. Speakers need to be placed close to the hill to avoid dampness. Playing into the hill. Prime sunset view for dancers.

properties.title: machine hall
properties.description: Indoor area in a concrete building. concrete walls muffels sound nicely. windows have been sound proofed. Door open mean sound leaks. Acoustic challenge inside.
properties.upgrade-actions: Doors closed. Sound proofing entrances better.

properties.title: villa backyard
properties.description: Open area behind an abandoned house. Trees in all directions except NE. Slight depression in the landscape.

properties.description:
1000 m West from the Moomin Valley
1500 m West from the Hills

properties.title: Neighbour Community East

500 m East from Hidden Meadow
1000 m East from the Slope

properties.description:
500 m NE from Hidden Meadow
1000 m NE from the Slope
Obs! Behind Långanäsasjön which may carry sound.

750 m North from the Hidden Meadow
1000 North by North East from the Slope
Obs! Behind Långanäsasjön which may carry sound.
properties.title: Neighbour Dwellings North by North-East

properties.description:
1500 m from the Moomin Valley
2000 m from the Hills
properties.title: Neighbour Farm West by North West
Neighbour Lodges
properties.description: 1750 m South West from the Hills
